---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem statement

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the situation that motivates it.

## Proposed solution

Describe your proposed approach. Be specific about the interface or behavior you expect.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why did you rule them out?

## Is this a security-sensitive feature?

If this feature touches the gateway middleware chain, hooks, policy loading, audit logging, or secret redaction, it may have security implications. If yes, describe the threat model impact. Security findings should be reported via [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/bookedsolidtech/reagent/security/advisories/new) rather than public issues.

## Additional context

Any relevant prior art, linked issues, or design notes.
